name: de.fidonis/qdrant-mcp-rbac
title: Qdrant RBAC
description: Role-based access to your Qdrant vector store, via MCP. OIDC in, scoped JWTs out.

environmentVariables.name: OIDC_ISSUER_URL
environmentVariables.description: OIDC issuer / realm URL, e.g. https://kc.example.com/realms/myrealm

environmentVariables.name: OIDC_AUDIENCE
environmentVariables.description: Expected aud claim of incoming access tokens, e.g. mcp-server

environmentVariables.name: QDRANT_JWT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: HS256 signing secret; must equal Qdrant's service.api_key
